name: Washington Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Washington - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Washington State Department of Health
P.O. Box 47865
Olympia, WA 98504-7865

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the Washington NAC exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The WA Nursing Assistant Certified exam is administered by Credentia. Register at credentia.com/test-takers/wa.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify a Washington CNA/NAC?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the WA DOH Provider Credential Search at fortress.wa.gov/doh/providercredentialsearch/. Search for credential type 'Nursing Assistant Certification – NC'.
